name: Missed a week of work after ladder fall in Draper—how calculate lost wages?
description: Avg weekly pay x time off; prove with stubs.

mainEntity.name: Missed a week of work after ladder fall in Draper—how calculate lost wages?

acceptedAnswer.text: Avg weekly pay x time off; prove with stubs.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Wages = average weekly x weeks missed + future if disabled; workers' comp pays partial, suit full.** Tax-free[3]. **Key factors:** 1. Pay stubs prove base. 2. Bonuses/OT included. 3. Doctor restrictions. 4. Permanent multipliers. Submit to insurer. Lawyer ensures full amount.
